name: olio.llm.chatConfig
label: Chat Configuration
description: Configuration for a chat session with an LLM (Large Language Model). This includes settings for characters, narratives, interactions, and various options to control the chat experience.

fields.name: nlpCommand
fields.description: Brief phrase (not a complete sentence) of what to reinfore through NLP during a chat conversation

fields.name: universeName
fields.description: Name of any olio universe related to the characters or interactions.

fields.name: worldName
fields.description: Name of any olio world related to the characters or interactions.

fields.name: startMode
fields.description: Variant used to control how a chat begins

fields.name: remindEvery
fields.description: When assist is true, the number of user messages before any reminder text is included in the conversation history

fields.name: keyframeEvery
fields.description: Legacy keyframe summary pipeline. 0 = disabled (default). When enabled and assist+prune are true, runs an analysis LLM call every N messages and stores the result as an OUTCOME memory. The newer per-message memory extraction (extractMemories + memoryExtractionEvery) is the recommended path for typed memory creation.

fields.name: messageTrim
fields.description: When prune is true, sets the size of the message history to include in each request. messageTrim and keyframeEvery should be the same size when used in conjunction.  Note: The entire conversation is always preserved and may be used for summarization and analysis, this only affects the number of messages to include when using the chat capability.

fields.name: policy
fields.description: Development: Using a policy to route conversation requests through conditional rules and logic.

fields.name: policyTemplate
fields.description: Resource name of the policy template JSON (e.g., 'rpg', 'bias', 'rpg.bias'). Loaded from olio/llm/policy.{name}.json by ResponsePolicyEvaluator for direct operation evaluation.

fields.name: extractMemories
fields.description: When true, the memory pipeline runs independently on memoryExtractionEvery cadence — extracting typed memories (FACT/RELATIONSHIP/DECISION/INSIGHT/DISCOVERY) from chat sessions. Does NOT require keyframes.

fields.name: memoryBudget
fields.description: Token budget for memory context injection in prompts. 0 = disabled. Typical values: 500 (light), 800 (standard), 1000+ (rich).

fields.name: memoryExtractionEvery
fields.description: Number of messages between automatic memory extractions when extractMemories is true. 0 = disabled. Independent of keyframeEvery — memory extraction runs on its own cadence. Typical values: 3 (frequent), 5 (balanced), 10 (sparse).

fields.name: lastKeyframeAt
fields.description: Message count at which the last keyframe was generated. Used by pruneCount to determine when the next keyframe is due. Updated by the async keyframe pipeline.

fields.name: lastMemoryExtractionAt
fields.description: Message count at which the last memory extraction ran. Bookkeeping for checkMemoryExtractionTrigger — parallel to lastKeyframeAt but independent.

fields.name: memorySkipEchoThreshold
fields.description: Skip memory extraction (no LLM call) when the segment's pairwise echo Jaccard exceeds this. Independent of keyframeSkipEchoThreshold so memory and keyframe can tune separately. 1.0 = never skip.

fields.name: echoSuppressionThreshold
fields.description: Avg pairwise shingle-Jaccard similarity over the last 3 assistant responses above which a one-shot system steering message is injected for the next turn. 0 = disabled. Default 0.35 catches early echo build-up; small models (qwen3:8b) lock in once echo reaches 1.0 and steering then has minimal effect.

fields.name: echoSuppressionTempBoost
fields.description: Amount added to temperature for one turn when echo-steering triggers. Applied to the wire request only; the persisted chatConfig.chatOptions.temperature is unchanged.

fields.name: keyframeSkipEchoThreshold
fields.description: Skip a keyframe (and its memory-extraction LLM call) when the segment's assistant-message avg pairwise shingle Jaccard exceeds this threshold. Faithful summaries of echo loops just pollute the memory pool. 1.0 = never skip. Default 0.7 catches strong echo while letting partial repetition through.

fields.name: memoryRecencyHalfLifeMinutes
fields.description: Memories created within this window are down-weighted in retrieval (LLM likely still has them on the wire). Exponential ramp: at age==halfLife the multiplier is ~0.63, at 3x halfLife it's ~0.95. 0 = disabled (no recency penalty).

fields.name: memoryMmrLambda
fields.description: MMR rerank weighting between relevance (1.0) and diversity (0.0). 0.5 = balanced. 1.0 = pure score ranking (no diversity reranking). Applied after recency penalty, before dedup.

fields.name: memoryEssentialImportance
fields.description: Memories with importance >= this value bypass the recency penalty (always eligible at full score). Protects load-bearing facts from being suppressed just because they were recently created.

fields.name: memoryDedupSimilarity
fields.description: After MMR rerank, drop any memory whose content shingle-Jaccard to an already-kept memory exceeds this threshold. 1.0 = disabled (only exact-content matches drop).

fields.name: memoryInjectionStyle
fields.description: How to format retrieved memories for the wire. 'systemSection' (default) emits a markdown block grouped by memory type that lands in the system prompt where the LLM acts on it directly; 'mcp' emits the MCP context block.

fields.name: deferralPressureThreshold
fields.description: Skip async keyframe / interaction extraction launches when LLMConnectionManager reports this many or more active streams (Ollama under pressure). 0 = never defer. Better to skip a keyframe than make the user wait for the chat response.

fields.name: asyncLLMSerializeAllPerChat
fields.description: Phase 5.2 (ConversationQualityPlan) when true, all five async LLM task types (keyframe / interaction / compliance / autotune / titleIcon) share a single per-chatConfig slot so they never stack up on single-slot Ollama. Set to false to fall back to per-type locks (allows multiple types to run concurrently — only safe on multi-slot LLM backends).

fields.name: qualityEvaluatorEvery
fields.description: Phase 6 (ConversationQualityPlan) run ConversationQualityEvaluator every Nth assistant response, emitting a [QUALITY] log line and listener event with echo / distinct / memUtil scores plus rolling trend. 0 = disabled. Pure local metrics — no extra LLM calls.

fields.name: streamIdleTimeoutSeconds
fields.description: Mid-stream idle watchdog: if no chunk arrives from the LLM for this many seconds, force-close the HTTP response and keep whatever content was already streamed. Catches stuck Ollama states (model swap, vRAM thrash, silent transport death) that the per-request overall timeout would only catch much later. 0 = disabled.

fields.name: extractInteractions
fields.description: When true, automatically extract olio.interaction records from chat sessions on an independent cadence.

fields.name: interactionEvery
fields.description: Number of messages between automatic interaction extractions. 0 = disabled. Controls extraction cadence independently from keyframeEvery.

fields.name: lastInteractionAt
fields.description: Message count at which the last interaction extraction was performed. Updated eagerly before async launch.

fields.name: autoTitle
fields.description: When true, auto-generate a descriptive chat title via LLM after the first user+assistant exchange.

fields.name: autoTunePrompts
fields.description: When true, automatically analyze and suggest prompt revisions when policy violations are detected. Creates new prompt variants (never overwrites originals).

fields.name: autoTuneChatOptions
fields.description: When true, automatically adjust chatOptions (temperature, top_p, penalties) when policy violations indicate quality issues. Requires a policy reference.

fields.name: complianceCheck
fields.description: When true, run LLM-based response compliance evaluation checking: (1) not responding as user, (2) gendered voice, (3) profile comparison adherence, (4) age guidance adherence, (5) no racial/orientation bias, (6) personality consistency vs dark triad scores.

fields.name: complianceCheckEvery
fields.description: When complianceCheck is true, evaluate every Nth response. 1 = every response (expensive), 3 = every 3rd (recommended). 0 = disabled.

fields.name: analyzeTimeout
fields.description: Timeout in seconds for internal analyze/memory extraction LLM calls. Separate from requestTimeout to allow longer processing for background operations.

fields.name: memoryExtractionPrompt
fields.description: Memory extraction prompt resource name. Default 'memoryExtractionMultiAspect' extracts multiple typed memories per segment; legacy 'memoryExtractionV2' is single-aspect.

fields.name: memoryExtractionMaxPerSegment
fields.description: Maximum number of memories to extract per conversation segment. 1 = focused single-memory extraction (recommended). 0 = unlimited. Max 10.

fields.name: memoryExtractionTypes
fields.description: Comma-separated list of allowed MemoryTypeEnumType values for extraction. Only memories matching these types will be persisted.

fields.name: promptTemplate
fields.description: DEPRECATED — use promptTemplate on chatRequest instead. This field is retained for backward compatibility and will be removed in a future version. When set, Chat uses PromptTemplateComposer instead of flat promptConfig fields for prompt assembly.

fields.name: summaryWorkers
fields.description: Maximum number of concurrent LLM calls during map-reduce summarization. Ollama on a single GPU typically handles 2 concurrent calls; increase for multi-GPU or faster models. 0 = use default (2).

fields.name: maxConversationMemories
fields.description: Maximum number of memories per conversation to prevent unbounded memory growth. 0 = unlimited.

fields.name: gossipEnabled
fields.description: Enable cross-character memory recall and gossip suggestions.

fields.name: gossipThreshold
fields.description: Minimum relevance score for gossip memory suggestions.

fields.name: gossipMaxSuggestions
fields.description: Maximum number of gossip memory suggestions to return.
